Who it's for

Built for every team that touches a hire.

Recruiting Teams

Screen faster and surface the strongest candidates with evidence-backed insights.

Hiring Managers

Evaluate real-world potential, not resumes or interview impressions.

Talent Leaders

Build consistent, scalable processes that improve quality of hire across the org.

Interview Panels

Align around objective data to make fairer, more confident decisions.

Functional Operators

Operationalize simulations and data to keep hiring processes efficient.

Built for high-stakes hiring.

Our platform is purpose-built to help teams make better hiring decisions, at scale.

Structured simulations

Role-specific simulations reveal how candidates think, decide, and perform in realistic scenarios.

Objective scoring

AI-powered scoring removes bias and provides consistent, explainable evaluation across every candidate.

Faster decision-making

Automate evaluation and reporting so teams can move quickly without compromising on quality.

fydell

Real work, not polished resumes.
